h9b3f1d4cgc9c6g4ab3g93f8g6cb74cb9200b: That was a failed spell if ever I heard one.
h51168852g27efg40ddg933fgd48c1cf5a4a6: Failure. Yes. You'd think I'd be used to it by now.
h43428883g5990g423dgb747g0a26f7c7cc3f: It's getting late. I think I'll turn in. Perhaps some sleep will do me good.
h012d1a3fg75eeg40e2g99c7g41b5433cc3dc: I didn't recognize your hand gestures. What spell were you trying to cast?
hf9e374f5g02efg4a92g95e4gc38ca33c7d46: A bygone spell from a bygone age. It doesn't matter.
h5015a779gb2e8g46f8g8e6fg0e293446b879: Come, you know I care about you. I showed you when we shared that spell.
hb905a153gb578g4365ga96fg313c7fcc4b51: Just now, I was trying to cast a spell I once cast with ease, but I failed.
h1aaf18cegf597g4456g9831ge2b786547377: You see, this fire - there was a time that I could make it come alive. That it would take the shape of a dragon and roar in delight.
ha6b241d0gd694g4321gba2cgf21c570dee1b: There was a time I could silence a Beholder with a word, and lift a tower from its foundations with a flourish.
h0ee24442gd499g43d9g907ega42d183f813c: There was a time I was all but one with the Weave. But no more - a mere shadow of the wizard I used to be.
h60150df9g70dfg4921g8e50g0fb85d750a24: Are you telling me you used to be an arch wizard?
h486edb87gbc02g42fbg8c52g535e08204e07: You've lost the favour of Mystra, haven't you? You said things were different once.
h95008245gebd0g4e59gbd73gdf29070914e5: Yes. That's right. Things were different once.
hcf110163geb85g48cegb4b6g93a36b64356e: You can tell me. You can trust me.
h4579a40egffa5g4f18gb817g8d60e88bd267: Trust is not the issue. The issue is that the truth doesn't matter. Secret or revealed, the outcome is the same.
hb0ce29c4g6a8cg4efcg95c4gf0bd3cfc926b: Go on. Every burden is easier to carry when shared.
h748a9b9ag26ebg4adbgbb13gdb2eacde1598: I sought to impress her personally. To turn the eyes of my muse upon me. To win the favour of a goddess.
h22ed3aaegfbbcg479dg840dgb6e9041838e9: But I failed, and all I invoked was death and dismissal. My death. Her dismissal.
hc9306274gfceag441bgb2ffgc24dfd26cf51: I'm sorry. I cannot begin to understand being abandoned by the goddess.
h90e9b4ecg087cg4389gb3c5g4784446bc3b9: You're a good friend. I often think of that moment we shared together - one under the Weave.
h5e616b4eg6f77g4d59gbe87gab0e4cf39c07: I hope you think about it too.
h24d6e893ga89fg4c3agb62fg062ad7f5e9dd: I'm glad to know you think about it too.
h07c8ccc7g8745g4db1gbfa5ged75287e46b7: You're a good friend. I want you to know that.
h315b0cffg6bcbg4120gb7acg7b23d6a0d60c: You sense a moment of unspoken affection. You want to know where it may lead.
hf49f3d52g9ba0g4ffeg9be5gc06ac28ef61b: I consider myself very lucky to have found you.
he961853fg8193g4839gac8bgceac4bc0ffcc: I think perhaps we could be more than friends.
ha525c3fcgdbeeg4eafg981eg3e8ec8e31b69: Goodnight. And try not to think too poorly of me. A cat can look at a king. A wizard can look at a goddess.
hb5415ef8gdcf2g485dga49eg6a2fd3528f58: Goodnight. And thank you for your patient understanding.
ha9d74301g316dg4785ga986gd1133aff9d68: Don't get carried away imagining feelings that aren't there.
h56538403g0cd6g4c48gbf15g36478b3d9425: You're a good friend too, Gale.
he0734974g8d5cg4f24gb1b6g21f363cadd9b: Hold on to that thought. I may just have to remind you before all is said and done.
he3ef46b7g12cag4c7ag9c48g6c1d333872e9: Let's not get sentimental, shall we?
h61d4ac11gc76eg4415gaedfg6e55348bff76: I don't know what to make of what you've told me, but I sympathise.
ha82b8c2agbf70g4e82g8cf3g0e611bf69b5c: When devotion is blind, the goddess loses sight of you. Rightly too.
h859080d3g78ecg43b0ga1bagebc74d7e7b4a: You pray to the goddess for every spell and every blessing. You devote your life to her - are we truly so different?
h438908fag805cg4663g869age4e4f53d6c8d: Then again, if that is how you judge me, there's little I can do to change your mind. But know that I have this ambition still:
h73567f08g6384g4433ga4f0g7c9f0d5b72ab: First to save myself, and after that, the license to dream.
h8a033106g2b8dg4f11g85c8g71de85546a65: Another fool pays for his arrogance. A tale as old as time.
h79155eddg8555g44cagaabbgda4754e043e6: Arrogance? Ambition, rather. And ambition is a fine thing - until suddenly it no longer is.
hcb3723aeg9b57g4161g92ebge654eb7c2813: I'm strong enough. I'll carry on alone.
ha522e594g0bcbg4bc6g92f9g822df5eabf8b: It's all right, you don't have to tell me.
he66a6a71gcc59g43b3g9e61g964bbb07fa54: I don't understand. What is it that you've lost?
ha90fdec5gb574g4de4ga3fbg2fff0601b4fa: I am the man who came after - after having lost...
h7fd96509g7a16g49d9gb514g0ef011a36143: If this is meant to be suspenseful, I assure you it's not.
h8c93f3feg84f6g4465ga349g687409200b89: Just now, I was trying to cast a spell I once cast with ease, but as you pointed out, I failed.
h6560a85agf4fdg4449gbe6fge1c28682497f: We shared the Weave the other night. Now share what's on your mind.
h7c6f8446g88a9g4dbag965fg804a974a6ce1: Tonight's not a night for sharing. Tonight's a night for regrets.
h6f5f54d6gf50cg4e3eg89e9g5e21cc40d89f: With that I bid you an evening better than my own.
hb7c8cd49gdd2dg4395g9419g3ff446cadd8d: I'm the leader of this party. I need to know what's going on.
ha6d5ec23g96ebg4ec7gb322g586b6dfa1f4b: You're the leader, and I will follow you where you go, but not down the paths of my own regrets.
h4637f70bg8190g445dga8eag5f6af7508f34: You will tell me, and you'll tell me now.
h802aab59geb51g400bgb8a1gb2d84f6751bd: I said 'please', but that courtesy was a mere formality. What I meant was: you will let it rest.
h5ddc65f6g2d2ag43dcgb3e6g331ba9edd5d1: They say you should never go to bed angry.
ha8e179d4gfb93g4300gb4abg2a5ac9384759: Isn't that advice for couples? The only one I'm angry with is myself.
he0cbcf21ga43ag4cf3gb82cgca2c7008d9c6: Ever the mystery man, aren't you?
hd964ee86g3ae5g468egab6dgcf852f7597df: I simply have a lot on my mind.
h662bcf1cg57b3g445bgbfbeg2257308da52d: You don't sound very happy there, Gale.
h68558267g1865g4c21ga003ge80d6616232d: Happiness is like a stray cat: sometimes it seeks you out, sometimes it ignores you. Tonight, I'm ignored.
hdd474545ge350g4a12g931dg7cc5f97aecde: Let's just say not all is right. But that goes for all of us.
h6241d1b6g7c36g48e4g9dd6g8f2b2c009b13: Do you mind? I'd like some peace and quiet.
h49c1e631gcc18g458eg9cb0gbdcbae66b13c: Quiet you can have - peace I can't guarantee. Especially not peace of mind.
